description_long: This is a small, rectangular, single-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist, utilitarian design. The front facade features a central yellow ladder leading up to the roof, flanked by two sets of rectangular windows with horizontal slats. The exterior walls are finished in a plain gray concrete or stucco texture, giving the building an industrial appearance. The house sits on a grassy plot bordered by a sidewalk, with outdoor elements including a green bench, two barrels, and several cubic crates. A small, round, pink figure is positioned on the roof, adding a whimsical touch to the otherwise stark structure. The rear and side walls are unadorned, emphasizing the building's simple, boxy form.
description: A small, flat-roofed, gray house with a yellow ladder, rectangular windows, and minimal exterior decoration, set on a grassy plot with urban street elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow ladder, two sets of windows, green bench, barrels, crates, and the pink figure on the roof.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the plain gray wall, the side of the roof, and partial visibility of the barrels and crates.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless gray wall and the pink figure on the roof, with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the side of the house, the green bench, a barrel, and the yellow ladder partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central yellow ladder with no visible traditional door, minimalistic and functional with no decorative elements
